    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    AdminController
    Controller for the admin view.
    Album
    Stores one album and its photo references.
    AlbumController
    Controller for the album view.
    CreateAlbumFromSearchDialogController
    Controller for the create album from search dialog view.
    DataStore
    Loads and saves the application's serialized data.
    LoginController
    Controller for the login view.
    Photo
    Stores one photo's shared metadata for a user.
    PhotoDetailController
    Controller for the photo detail view.
    Photos
    Main JavaFX launcher for the PhotosXX application.
    PhotosData
    Root application data container.
    SearchController
    Controller for the search view.
    Tag
    Stores one tag on a photo.
    TagDefinition
    Defines one tag type.
    User
    Stores one user's albums and photo library.
    UserAlbumsController
    Controller for the user albums view.
